Portfolio

Kihun Lee

Management student building at the intersection of business, finance, creativity, and digital systems.

I'm passionate about structured problem solving, financial analysis, and creating thoughtful systems — whether it's a financial model, a brand identity, or a personal productivity framework.

View ProjectsResumeContact

About

A bit about me

I'm a BBA student at the University of Toronto Scarborough, specializing in Management with a focus on accounting and finance. I'm drawn to the clarity of numbers and the structure of financial systems.

Beyond the classroom, I enjoy building things — financial models, marketing campaigns, analytical dashboards, and personal systems that help me think and work better.

I believe the best work happens at intersections — business and creativity, analysis and design, strategy and execution. That mindset drives how I approach everything from case competitions to club leadership.

I'm currently seeking internship opportunities in investment banking, accounting, finance, and business advisory where I can apply my analytical skills and grow professionally.

Projects

Featured Work

A selection of projects spanning finance, accounting, analytics, marketing, and systems design.

FinanceValuationExcel

3-Statement Financial Model & DCF Valuation

Built an integrated 3-statement financial model with a discounted cash flow valuation from scratch in Excel, modeling revenue growth, working capital, and terminal value assumptions.

ExcelFinancial Modeling
AccountingAnalytics

Financial Statement Analysis Project

Conducted a comprehensive analysis of public company financial statements, evaluating profitability, liquidity, and solvency ratios to assess financial health and performance trends.

ExcelSEC FilingsRatio Analysis
AccountingAnalyticsDesign

Audit Analytics Dashboard

Designed and developed an interactive analytics dashboard for audit data, automating key risk indicators and visualizing anomalies across financial transactions.

ExcelPythonData Visualization
MarketingDesignLeadership

UTKSA Marketing & Branding Project

Led the marketing and branding strategy for the University of Toronto Korean Students' Association, creating visual assets, social media campaigns, and event promotional materials.

CanvaInstagramBranding Strategy
AnalyticsTechnical

Python Data Analysis Mini Project

Explored and analyzed real-world datasets using Python, applying data cleaning, exploratory analysis, and visualization techniques to uncover actionable insights.

PythonPandasMatplotlib
SystemsDesignProductivity

Personal Productivity & Systems Project

Designed a personal productivity system integrating task management, goal tracking, and knowledge management tools to optimize daily workflows and long-term planning.

NotionSystems ThinkingAutomation
